text: Build governed AI workflows with You.com
textPreview: Build governed AI workflows with You.com

text: A public workshop series that turns one repeated GTM task into a reusable Hermes workflow: source-grounded, tool-connected, reviewed, and ready to pilot.
textPreview: A public workshop series that turns one repeated GTM task into a reusable Hermes workflow: source-grounded, tool-connected, reviewed, and...

text: Teams do not buy answers. They buy repeatable work.
textPreview: Teams do not buy answers. They buy repeatable work.

text: The workshop starts with the gap between a good AI answer and a workflow a team can actually run.
textPreview: The workshop starts with the gap between a good AI answer and a workflow a team can actually run.

text: The flagship workflow makes Hermes concrete.
textPreview: The flagship workflow makes Hermes concrete.

text: /account-action-brief turns ServiceNow into a source-backed brief, approved outreach angle, CRM update draft, and review request.
textPreview: /account-action-brief turns ServiceNow into a source-backed brief, approved outreach angle, CRM update draft, and review request.

text: Use ServiceNow as a public demo account and define the meeting goal.
textPreview: Use ServiceNow as a public demo account and define the meeting goal.

text: Search, inspect source pages, and escalate to deeper research when needed.
textPreview: Search, inspect source pages, and escalate to deeper research when needed.

text: Produce internal and external outputs with source requirements.
textPreview: Produce internal and external outputs with source requirements.

text: NemoClaw checks claims, then Slack and CRM receive drafts for approval.
textPreview: NemoClaw checks claims, then Slack and CRM receive drafts for approval.

text: Each tool has one job in the story.
textPreview: Each tool has one job in the story.

text: This keeps the session from becoming a tool zoo and lets Hermes remain the operating layer.
textPreview: This keeps the session from becoming a tool zoo and lets Hermes remain the operating layer.

text: Part 1 creates the first reusable Hermes command.
textPreview: Part 1 creates the first reusable Hermes command.

text: The audience sees a repeated research task become a named workflow with inputs, source rules, and an output contract.
textPreview: The audience sees a repeated research task become a named workflow with inputs, source rules, and an output contract.

text: Define the job: account research plus recommended next action.
textPreview: Define the job: account research plus recommended next action.

text: Create /account-action-brief with account, goal, audience, and output inputs.
textPreview: Create /account-action-brief with account, goal, audience, and output inputs.

text: Use You.com Search, Contents, and Research to ground the brief.
textPreview: Use You.com Search, Contents, and Research to ground the brief.

text: Produce a structured internal account-action brief.
textPreview: Produce a structured internal account-action brief.

text: Capture the first Hermes workflow card.
textPreview: Capture the first Hermes workflow card.

text: Part 2 connects the workflow to real operating context.
textPreview: Part 2 connects the workflow to real operating context.

text: Hermes coordinates the systems teams already use while keeping actions draft-only until reviewed.
textPreview: Hermes coordinates the systems teams already use while keeping actions draft-only until reviewed.

text: Part 3 answers the governance question directly.
textPreview: Part 3 answers the governance question directly.

text: The point is not to automate judgment away. The point is to make tool use, claims, and review rules explicit.
textPreview: The point is not to automate judgment away. The point is to make tool use, claims, and review rules explicit.

text: Define roles: runner, owner, reviewer, and admin.
textPreview: Define roles: runner, owner, reviewer, and admin.

text: Expose only the tools the workflow needs.
textPreview: Expose only the tools the workflow needs.

text: Separate read-only context from draft actions.
textPreview: Separate read-only context from draft actions.

text: Use NemoClaw to flag risky claims, sensitive language, and high-risk actions.
textPreview: Use NemoClaw to flag risky claims, sensitive language, and high-risk actions.

text: Require human approval before external use.
textPreview: Require human approval before external use.

text: Part 4 turns the demo into a pilot plan.
textPreview: Part 4 turns the demo into a pilot plan.

text: Hermes becomes the packaging layer: owner, schema, review gates, metrics, rollout, and expansion backlog.
textPreview: Hermes becomes the packaging layer: owner, schema, review gates, metrics, rollout, and expansion backlog.

text: The attendee leaves with something they can run, not just remember.
textPreview: The attendee leaves with something they can run, not just remember.

text: The live demo follows one clean path.
textPreview: The live demo follows one clean path.

text: Use one account and one workflow so the audience tracks the Hermes lifecycle instead of chasing integrations.
textPreview: Use one account and one workflow so the audience tracks the Hermes lifecycle instead of chasing integrations.

text: The artifacts are what make the workshop operational and conversion-ready.
textPreview: The artifacts are what make the workshop operational and conversion-ready.

text: Carrying out the workshop is a three-phase motion.
textPreview: Carrying out the workshop is a three-phase motion.

text: The event should qualify pilot intent before, create artifacts during, and convert momentum after.
textPreview: The event should qualify pilot intent before, create artifacts during, and convert momentum after.

text: The series can run in four parts or two sessions.
textPreview: The series can run in four parts or two sessions.

text: Four parts gives Hermes more room to be the hero. Two sessions works when calendar space is tight.
textPreview: Four parts gives Hermes more room to be the hero. Two sessions works when calendar space is tight.

text: Keep adjacent use cases as hints
textPreview: Keep adjacent use cases as hints

text: The follow-up motion should ask for one named workflow.
textPreview: The follow-up motion should ask for one named workflow.

text: That is the clearest signal that the attendee is ready for a pilot conversation.
textPreview: That is the clearest signal that the attendee is ready for a pilot conversation.

text: Which repeated workflow do you want to make reusable?
textPreview: Which repeated workflow do you want to make reusable?

text: Which systems need to be connected?
textPreview: Which systems need to be connected?

text: Is the workflow internal-only or external-facing?
textPreview: Is the workflow internal-only or external-facing?

text: What would make a two-week pilot successful?
textPreview: What would make a two-week pilot successful?

text: Bring one workflow your team already runs manually.
textPreview: Bring one workflow your team already runs manually.

text: We will map the sources, tools, review rules, and pilot plan needed to make it reusable.
textPreview: We will map the sources, tools, review rules, and pilot plan needed to make it reusable.

text: Register to build a governed Hermes workflow your team can pilot.
textPreview: Register to build a governed Hermes workflow your team can pilot.
